Explanation: Bulk capacitance for 24V input filtering and smoothing the output of all five buck regulators.

Non-polarized line filtering capacitors across the main 24V input and common-mode choke.

Load capacitors for the three Pierce oscillators ensuring the required 180-degree phase shift for the hardware clocks.
4.7nF high-voltage filter capacitor for the USB shield/ground tying.

Schottky diodes. D5 provides core reverse-polarity protection; the others isolate the motor regulators from the main VBB rail.
